task: BUILD-PLAN v3 trinn 4C - PARTIAL deep structural contract for the Clubhouse (first deep pilot)
authoritative_head: 130c5d9 (4B-3 status commit) + the approved 4C semantic markup in renderClubhouseDashboard() (uncommitted)
classification_rationale: Deep pilot of the Clubhouse (app-shell primary surface) + a semantic markup change in renderClubhouseDashboard(). Per cross-cutting rule B this is product-wide.
risk_rationale: App-code change is limited to the already-approved semantic markup in renderClubhouseDashboard(): #clubhouse-grid id, data-clubhouse-component taxonomy on all 17 boxes, Record + 8 stat divs -> native <button> with accessible names, Breakscore role=group + accessible name. No CSS, no layout/position/background/typography change (verified via the button.chd-box reset already in place from 4B-2). Otherwise tests + docs only.
changed_files_note: Only app.js (approved semantic markup) + the two new files are written in this step. CONTRACT-REGISTER.md and clubhouse-default.md are listed for LATER (after the local tests are green); they are NOT written now. styles.css is untouched.
app_code_change_detail: renderClubhouseDashboard() markup only: (1) .chd wrapper gets id=clubhouse-grid; (2) data-clubhouse-component on all 17 boxes (record 1 / challenge 1 / nav 6 / stat 8 / breakscore 1); (3) Record + 8 stat <div onclick=openStatDetail(...)> -> <button type=button aria-label=...> (onclick preserved); (4) Breakscore stays a non-interactive <div> with role=group + aria-label=Breakscore. No CSS, no positions, no background images, no inner values/text changed.

count_freeze.note: Approved count-freeze. Finding AG: '16' was an outdated pre-Challenge count; 17 is canonical after Today's Challenge became its own slot and the separate Resume box was removed.

stable_anchors: #clubhouse-grid, [data-clubhouse-component] (record|challenge|nav|stat|breakscore), native roles + accessible names. NEVER nth-child, inline-style/click-attribute selectors, background images, coordinates, .chd class chains, or exact px/%/cqw/typography values.
contract_covers: unique #tab-dashboard + Clubhouse is the active main page (body[data-tab]=dashboard, nav active)
exactly one #clubhouse-grid, mounted in #dash-clubhouse-tail, no duplicate main roots
canonical component sequence record -> challenge -> nav x6 -> stat x8 -> breakscore
nav order + Record + 8 stat via native buttons with accessible names; Breakscore as non-interactive group
exactly one challenge/active-round slot; no separate mounted/visible Resume slot (#ch-resume-round unmounted, no ch-has-resume body state)
no transform: scale() on shell/dashboard/grid; no global zoom != 1; no horizontal overflow
same data-clubhouse-component sequence across all four projects
explicitly_not_locked: dimensions, component sizes, player layout, columns
spacing, internal component order beyond the taxonomy sequence
background images, coordinates, .chd class chains, inline styles
today's layout and visual design (NOT an approved baseline)
typography: BLOCKED/DEFERRED - no approved authoritative typography scale exists (tokens: scale pendingApproval). No typography assertions in 4C.
baseline_statement: Today's Clubhouse layout, typography and visual design are NOT an approved baseline. This contract covers structure, active state, mounting, exclusivity and layout invariants only. A future redesign may replace the internal DOM and update this contract; the durable [data-clubhouse-component] taxonomy is the stable surface.

product_findings.finding: The live Clubhouse content is mounted via a misnamed wrapper: renderClubhouseTrophiesPreview() (app.js:11238) returns renderClubhouseDashboard(). renderClubhouseInsightsPreview() returns '' (dead). renderDashboard() returns early at 3698. The contract targets the live DOM (#clubhouse-grid), not function names.
renderClubhouseTopCard() (app.js:11351, .ch-top-card/.ch-rc-value) is orphaned dead code; it is not used as a selector.

Hidden shell remnants: .clubhouse-crest / .clubhouse-sign / .clubhouse-divider are display:none !important (styles.css:6227); #dash-quick-strip is cleared empty; seven hidden #dash-* divs + #identity-hero. Deliberately kept out of the contract.

The .chd grid is width-proportional (container-type:inline-size + % positions + cqw fonts). 390x844 vs 412x915 differ only in absolute scale, not structure/order/counts. The structural contract is viewport-independent.
No approved authoritative typography scale exists (tokens: only min sizes approved; the complete scale is pendingApproval - REFERENCES.md). Exact typography is BLOCKED/DEFERRED.

The five approved component references (header, navrow, record, statbox, breakscore) are proportion/design-reference-only - NOT authoritative for CSS px, dynamic values, typography scale, responsive rules or scroll-policy. Exact pixel/proportion visual diff belongs to trinn 7 (visual regression), not 4C.

Clubhouse dynamic sublabels use cqw sizes (e.g. 1.55cqw, 1.9cqw) that render ~6-7px at the reference container width - below the approved minimum readable tokens. This is a legibility/product finding, NOT an approved baseline, and reinforces typography DEFERRED. Not repaired here.

'16' was an outdated pre-Challenge box count. The canonical structure is 17 after Today's Challenge became its own slot (tasks #242/#272) and the separate Resume box was removed (task #271). No current authoritative doc states 16.

Record and the eight statistics boxes were interactive <div onclick=openStatDetail(...)> without native button semantics, accessible names or built-in keyboard support - the same a11y gap as the nav icons before 4B-2 (finding P). They were converted to native <button type=button> with accessible names, with no visual or functional change, which also provides the stable anchors 4C needs.

deferred: Stat-box click interaction (task #121) - to be contracted semantically later WITHOUT locking today's modal implementation.
Typography scale approval + golden visual snapshots (trinn 7).
not_in_scope: CSS changes, other app.js changes, register/BUILD-PLAN updates (done later, after green)
